clientActions.instruction: Review and approve Phase 2 deliverables: Legal Pages (Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Disclaimer), Resource Center (blog/guides section), and GBP Mastery (Google Business Profile optimization).
DCF needs access to set up Google Analytics 4 and Google Business Profile. Share credentials or add assistant@gerlachlegal.com as a manager.
